command_checks.name: eval_matrix_run_schema_fields
command_checks.cmd: if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -c 'import json,sys;data=json.load(open("reports/eval_matrix.json",encoding="utf-8"));runs=((data.get("matrix") or {}).get("runs") or []);keys=("num_cases","scored_cases","passed","pass_rate","avg_oracle_score","avg_latency_proxy");ok=isinstance(runs,list) and bool(runs) and all(isinstance(r,dict) and all((k in r) and (r.get(k) is not None) for k in keys) for r in runs);missing=[f"{i}:{k}" for i,r in enumerate(runs) for k in keys if (not isinstance(r,dict)) or (k not in r) or (r.get(k) is None)];print("ok" if ok else f"eval_matrix_run_schema_invalid missing={missing}");sys.exit(0 if ok else 1)'; else python -c 'import json,sys;data=json.load(open("reports/eval_matrix.json",encoding="utf-8"));runs=((data.get("matrix") or {}).get("runs") or []);keys=("num_cases","scored_cases","passed","pass_rate","avg_oracle_score","avg_latency_proxy");ok=isinstance(runs,list) and bool(runs) and all(isinstance(r,dict) and all((k in r) and (r.get(k) is not None) for k in keys) for r in runs);missing=[f"{i}:{k}" for i,r in enumerate(runs) for k in keys if (not isinstance(r,dict)) or (k not in r) or (r.get(k) is None)];print("ok" if ok else f"eval_matrix_run_schema_invalid missing={missing}");sys.exit(0 if ok else 1)'; fi

command_checks.name: tool_verification_targeted_code_math_non_regression
command_checks.cmd: if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -c 'import json,sys;data=json.load(open("reports/eval_matrix.json",encoding="utf-8"));rows=((data.get("per_case_diffs") or {}).get("tool_first_on_vs_off") or []);targets=[r for r in rows if isinstance(r,dict) and str(r.get("case_id","")).startswith(("code_","math_"))];has_code=any(str(r.get("case_id","")).startswith("code_") for r in targets);has_math=any(str(r.get("case_id","")).startswith("math_") for r in targets);deltas=[float(r.get("tool_verified_delta")) for r in targets];ok=bool(targets) and has_code and has_math and all(v >= 0.0 for v in deltas);print("ok" if ok else f"tool_verification_targeted_non_regression_failed has_code={has_code} has_math={has_math} deltas={deltas}");sys.exit(0 if ok else 1)'; else python -c 'import json,sys;data=json.load(open("reports/eval_matrix.json",encoding="utf-8"));rows=((data.get("per_case_diffs") or {}).get("tool_first_on_vs_off") or []);targets=[r for r in rows if isinstance(r,dict) and str(r.get("case_id","")).startswith(("code_","math_"))];has_code=any(str(r.get("case_id","")).startswith("code_") for r in targets);has_math=any(str(r.get("case_id","")).startswith("math_") for r in targets);deltas=[float(r.get("tool_verified_delta")) for r in targets];ok=bool(targets) and has_code and has_math and all(v >= 0.0 for v in deltas);print("ok" if ok else f"tool_verification_targeted_non_regression_failed has_code={has_code} has_math={has_math} deltas={deltas}");sys.exit(0 if ok else 1)'; fi
